note: final_label is Papa-authored and overrides draft_label for these gold_ids. label_source for these rows := papa.

decisions.rationale: Spatial-regime distinction. AGN feedback is negative (quenching) in the central region but can be positive (compresses gas, triggers SF) in the outskirts. Same mechanism, different region -> complementary facets that coexist, not a denial. -> related_different_facet.

Page-58 claim is general: satellite quenching is environmental, distinct from mass-driven in centrals. Paper claims that at least in the high-mass regime satellites behave mass-driven like centrals. Not contradictory across all regimes, but it denies the claim's explicit 'distinct from mass-driven' assertion within the high-mass regime. Net -> contradicts.

Page-58 is about how large AGN feedback's role specifically is in environmental quenching; the paper discusses AGN feedback in general (integrated lifetime energy vs current luminosity). Overlapping topic, different context. -> related_different_facet.

boundary_principle_established: contradicts := candidate denies the base claim's explicit assertion, even if only within a sub-regime (see 001). related_different_facet := candidate describes a different or complementary aspect without denying the assertion (see 000, 003). Any future contradicts mining must satisfy the denial-of-assertion criterion, not merely 'opposite direction'.
mine_resolution_2026-06-23: Papa chose 'mine'. Mine complete + adjudicated -> contradicts_mine_20260623T062201Z/papa_adjudication_contradicts_mine.json. 278 candidates panelled, 3 surfaced (1.1%): mine-000 = re-find of stance2b-001, mine-024/066 both rejected by Papa as related_different_facet (BH-mass primacy co-varies with stellar-mass primacy via M_BH-M_bulge -> no denial). Net new contradicts = 0; class confirmed n=1, slice-2b exhausted.
open_decision: Lock the gold set. contradicts confirmed n=1 (stance2b-001 only), corpus exhausted (mining done). Recommended: lock v3 129-row set, score the 3 populated classes {supports/related_different_facet/unrelated}, keep contradicts as a documented 1-row sentinel (not a scored F1 class), keep mine-024/066 out of the scored set. See mine sidecar for the full terms + optional hard-negative toggle.
